question: Will the upper limit of the target range of the federal funds rate (interest rate) set by the Federal Open Market Committee have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-11-23?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DFEDTARU once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-11-23 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-11-13) was 4.000. (The latest value released in Federal Funds Target Range - Upper Limit from the release FOMC Press Release.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: This series represents upper limit of the federal funds target range established by the Federal Open Market Committee. The data updated each day is the data effective as of that day..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Percent.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily, 7-Day
